config.title: SVN Tree
config.displayLanguage.description: Preferred display language for SVN Tree. When set to Auto, the extension follows the current VS Code UI language.
config.displayLanguage.auto: Detect automatically from the current VS Code UI language.
config.displayLanguage.en: Always show English UI text for runtime views and prompts.
config.displayLanguage.zhCN: Always show Simplified Chinese UI text for runtime views and prompts.
config.enableInlineBlame.description: Show compact SVN blame information for the current line in the active saved working copy editor.
config.remoteStatusIntervalSeconds.descr: Interval in seconds between automatic remote status refreshes.
config.maxLogEntries.description: Number of revisions loaded per batch in the history webview. Older history is fetched automatically as you scroll.
config.revisionGraphTrunkNames.descripti: Repository path segment names that should be treated as trunk roots in the Revision Graph.
config.revisionGraphBranchContainerNames: Repository path segment names that contain branch references in the Revision Graph.
config.revisionGraphTagContainerNames.de: Repository path segment names that contain tag references in the Revision Graph.
